Veterans Benefits: Virginia exempts qualifying 100% disabled veterans and surviving spouses from real property tax, provides a one-vehicle personal property tax exemption for eligible 100% disabled veterans, and allows a military retirement pay subtraction up to $40,000 for eligible veterans age 55 and older.
LGBTQSource: HRC Fairfax County 2025 MEI scorecard; MAP Virginia Equality Profile 2026
Description: Northern Virginia CDP near Dulles International Airport with high housing and living costs, strong tech and federal contracting access, local aviation and history amenities, and a nearby VA outpatient clinic at Fort Belvoir. It offers suburban access to the Dulles/Tysons job corridor and Smithsonian Udvar-Hazy Center, with car dependence and high prices as major tradeoffs.
